# Phase 47: Coach Dashboard Homepage Stats - Context

**Gathered:** 2026-04-13

<domain>
## Phase Boundary

A coach opening `/coach` sees a quick-scan performance snapshot of their assigned students — 4 KPI cards, 3 most-recent reports, and a weekly top-3 hours leaderboard — served from one batch RPC and one cache tag, so the page loads under one second at 5k scale.

</domain>
